prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `c62e2108`.
codex_response:
Implemented `c62e2108` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: each non-blue hollow `4x4` frame repeats in 4-cell steps toward any matching blue edge guides on its own rows or columns; top/bottom guides create only a vertical strip, left/right guides create only a horizontal strip, and blue guides disappear in the output.

The Opus hint was usable as a starting point; I kept it, but documented the missing detail that orthogonal guides act independently rather than filling corner quadrants in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c62e2108/notes.md). No new primitive was needed.
